message:
feat(mvcc): unify FCW merge paths with structured rebase fallback chain

Collapse IntentReplay, StructuredPatch, and RawXorLab merge decisions
into a single code path that attempts try_structured_rebase_page first
(Level 3 structured patch via evaluate_merge_ladder), then falls back
to raw disjoint rebase for opaque pages. This eliminates the early abort
for intent replay at the storage layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
